name: HGLRC Specter 6-in-1 AIO - F722 FC + 40A ESC

Combining an F722 flight controller with a powerful 40A 6-channel ESC, the Specter eliminates messy wiring while delivering unmatched power and reliability.

The PM02 Power Module is designed to power an autopilot flight controller, an RC receiver, and APM accessories (GPS, radio).

name: FETtec G4 35A AIO Flight Controller
description: A powerful AIO board from FETtec in a small 20x20 mounted package.

name: JHEMCU F7-XSD Pro DJI Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 - Standard
description: The JHEMCU F7-XSD Pro Flight Controller is designed with DJI pilots in mind! This standard version F7 FC is ultra-light at 4.7g and handles up to 6S batteries.

name: JHEMCU NOXE F411 V2 DJI Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 - Standard
description: The JHEMCU NOXE F4 V2 Flight Controller is made with DJI Pilots in mind. This standard version FC packs 2 UARTs, and a BEC into a mini-sized 20x20 board with 3-6S capabilities!

name: JHEMCU NOXE F411 V2 DJI Flight Controller - Mini 20x20 - Deluxe
description: The JHEMCU NOXE F4 V2 Flight Controller is made with DJI Pilots in mind. This Deluxe FC packs a 16MB Blackbox, Barometer, 2 UARTs, and BEC into a mini-sized 20x20 board with 3-6S capabilities!

name: JHEMCU AIO Board - GSF405A F4 FC + 5A 1-2S ESC w/ Built-in ELRS 2.4GHz Receiver
description: The JHEMCU GS405A AIO features an F4 FC and a 5A ESC with built-in ELRS 2.4GHz receiver. This is an ultra-light 3.3g brushless AIO flight controller with 25.5x25.5mm mounting pattern!! This FC can handle 5A of continuous current and up to 2S.

name: T-Motor F7 PRO Flight Controller w/ WiFi + Bluetooth
description: T-Motor's F7 Pro Flight Controller has arrived! Enjoy full function in a wireless state! Great for cinematic professional use. This FC features 8 UARTS, WiFi and Bluetooth capabilites, and a 30.5x30.5 mounting pattern.

name: XILO Stax V2 F4 Flight Controller
description: The XILO Stax V2 F4 Flight Controller combines powerful F4 processing power with a host of features such as receiver mounting and VTX remote power switching. Plug n' play allows stacking with your favorite 4-in-1 ESC.

name: Axisflying F722 DJI Flight Controller w/ OSD - Mini 20x20
description: The Axisflying F722 Flight Controller is plug-and-play compatible for both Analog and HD and easily connects to a DJI FPV Air Unit. This FC has a 20x20 mounting pattern and features an MPU6000 Gyro, QMP6988 Barometer, and 5V 3A BEC.

name: Flywoo GN405 20A AIO BL_S Flight Controller
description:
Flywoo's new GOKU series AIO are finally here! The GOKU GN405 20A FC is an economical and durable all-in-one AIO, which can meet most of your FPV needs.
Uses a powerful F405 chip, integrated 5V BEC, barometer, black box, WS2812LED, supports 6 complete hardware serial ports, I2C, and other functions are available.

name: Flywoo Gn405 20A Aio Stack Hm850 Vtx
description:
Flywoo's new GOKU series AIO are finally here! The GOKU GN405 20A FC is an economical and durable all-in-one AIO, which can meet most of your FPV needs.
Uses a powerful F405 chip, integrated 5V BEC, barometer, black box, WS2812LED, supports 6 complete hardware serial ports, I2C, and other functions are available.

name: Flywoo GOKU GN722 HD EVO 40A BL_S AIO Flight Controller (20x20)
description: The Flywoo GN722 uses the powerful F722 chip accompanied by BLHELI_S ESC firmware. It is integrated with a 5V/9V dual BEC, barometer, black box, WS2812LED, supports 7 complete hardware serial ports, I2C, and other functions available.

name: T-Motor Mini Racer 20x20 F7 Flight Controller
description: The T-Motor Mini Racer F7 is a 3-6S 20x20 mini flight controller with a 16MB Blackbox flash memory, 5V.2A BEC, and an MPU6000 gyro. Designed for easy maintenance and low interference.

name: iFlight Beast H743 V2 AIO Board - H743 FC + 55A BLHeli_S ESC (BMI270)
description: This iFlight Beast H743 V2 AIO Board has an H743 Flight controller and a 55A BLHeli_S ESC.

name: HGLRC DJI Zeus F722 Mini 3-6S F7 Flight Controller
description: The HGLRC DJI Zeus F722 Mini is a 20x20 flight controller that houses an BMI270 gyro and 3-6S direct LiPo support. Comes with an integrated barometer, 8M black box, and DJI connector.

name: Matek Ap Periph Gnss M9N F4 3100 Can Gps
description: M9N-F4 series is based on ArudPilots’ AP_Periph firmware,  It is a GNSS+COMPASS+BAROMETER+IMU peripheral with CAN/UAVCAN and UART/MSP interfaces, plus 4x spare UARTs, 1x I2C expansion bus for additional peripherals.

name: iFlight SucceX-D F7 TwinG V2.2 F722 Flight Controller - HD Version
description: The iFlight SucceX-D F7 V2.2 is a 30.5x30.5 flight controller that has an F722 MCU and is designed to work seamlessly with DJI’s HD FPV system.

name: iFlight SucceX-D Whoop V3.2 AIO Board - F4 FC + 20A BLHeli_S ESC (MPU6000)
description: This iFlight SucceX-D V3.2 AIO Board has an F4 flight controller with a 20A BLHeli_S ESC. This whoop style board from iFlight is plug-n-play with the DJI Air Unit and Caddx Vista HD system.

name: iFlight Beast F7 V2 55A AIO 25.5x25.5mm Flight Controller
description: The Beast F7 55A AIO V2 FC is iFlight's new innovation! The new Beast series of AIO FCs combines MCU speed with ESC for a bigger stack!

name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C Aluminum Case + PM02 V3 Power Module
description: The Pixhawk 6C FC combined with the PM02 V3 12S Power Module brings tons of power to the autopilot and makes it super easy to power the multirotor.

name: FETtec FC G4 v1.7 Flight Controller
description: The FETtec FC G4 v1.7 features the latest STM32G4 processor. Providing unparalleled processing power to your aircraft. Along with an IIM-42652 SPI gyro, two 5v BECs, 6-27V (2-6S) power handling, and a host of other features, the G4 from FETtec is on the cutting edge of Flight Controller technology.

name: Holybro Pixhawk 6C Aluminum Case + PM07 Power Module + M9N GPS
description: The Pixhawk 6C FC combined with the PM07 12S Power Module + M9N GPS brings tons of power to the autopilot and makes it super easy to power and locate the multirotor.

name: Diatone Mamba DJI F722 MK2 Flight Controller - Mini 20x20
description: The Diatone Mamba DJI F722 MINI MK2 Flight Controller is a powerful yet small FC that is compatible with the DJI FPV System and related HD systems. The Mamba DJI F722 MINI MK2 FC is equipped with 216MHz STM32F722RET6 MCU, OSD, Dshot300/600/1200, barometer, 6 UARTS, and many other features that make this an excellent mini FC!

name: iFlight M8Q-5883 V2.0 GPS Module w/ Compass
description: The iFlight M8Q-5883 GPS comes with an integrated QMC5883L compass module, built-in TCXO crystal, and farad capacitor for a faster hot start, additional front-end LNA and many other features!

name: Diatone Mamba Basic F405 MINI MK3.5 20x20 Flight Controller
description: The Diatone Mamba Basic F405 Mini MK3.5 20x20 Flight Controller is equipped with I2C function, large solder pads, 5 UARTS, Type-C USB, and Diatone has recently increased the camera VCC power supply pad and updated many features to meet your FPV needs!

name: FETtec KISS G4-N AIO Board - G4-N FC + 35A 32bit 3-6S ESC
description: The FETtec G4-N AIO is a powerful AIO board from FETtec, featuring a G473 flight controller and 35A ESC. This product has no onboard analog OSD, but the use of digital OSDs is still possible as usual.

name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 45A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 45A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

name: JHEMCU GHF405 Pro AIO - F4 FC + 25A 3-6S BLHeli_S ESC
description: The JHEMCU GH405 Pro AIO is the updated F4 FC + 25A ESC by JHEMCU. This is an ultra-light 7.2g brushless AIO flight controller!

name: Hobbywing XRotor Micro Combo Stack - F7 FC + 60A 4-in-1 BLHeli_32 ESC
description: The XRotor Micro Combo from Hobbywing continues to impress with its latest iteration. The Micro Combo features a 60A 4-in-1 ESC along with an updated F7 Flight Controller. This new FC is similar to other versions with its OSD, and voltage monitoring, but the F7 now comes with an all-new 5V & 12V dual BEC Circuit and a special interface for the DJI image transmission system.

name: Betafpv F4 1S 12A Aio Brushless Flight Controller Spi Frsky
description: BETAFPV has come up with their F4 1S 12A AIO Flight Controller which is suitable for 3" lightweight builds and toothpick drones like the HX115 SE Toothpick Drone.

name: Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 FC + 50A BLHeli_32 2-6S ESC
description: The Lumenier LUX HD AIO F7 Flight Controller + ESC is DJI HD system ready with an onboard 9v regulator to power the DJI Air Unit in a simple plug-and-play configuration.

name: ZTAG Drone Laser Tag Board (1pc)
description: The ZTAG system is a Drone Laser Tag System designed to work with any HD digital drone! Are you ready to be a real fighter pilot? ZTAG simply provides a circuit board with mounting holes and you can decide the best way to mount this in front of your HD camera. There are STL files for common frames that have 18-33mm spacing between its bottom camera standoff screws. The board will require 5-28V input voltages (handles 2S-6S or 5V directly from your flight controller).

name: Happymodel BeecoreX FR V1.0 AIO F4 5-in-1 Brushed Flight Controller /w VTX+RX
description: The BeecoreX FR V1.0 is the ultimate 5-in-1 flight controller for a Brushed Tinywhoop and includes an F4 FC, VTX, ESC, frsky receiver, and betaflight OSD. This makes it very easy to build a brushed tiny whoop! Just add your FPV camera, brushed motors, frame, and propellers... then plug and play - no soldering required.

name: Zeez V2 F7 3-6S 20x20 Flight Controller
description: The Zeez F7 V2 2020 is an 8-Motor Output Flight Controller including an F7 processor designed with top-of-the-line hardware. This new V2 edition has improved stability and power supply cleaning. Pads are now easier to solder with added copper surrounding all pads to grant more strength. This FC is DJI HD System ready with a simple plug-and-play configuration. Get ready for the optimal flight experience with Zeez!

name: Happymodel Crazybee F4 V3.1 2-4S 4-in-1 12A AIO Flight Controller - SPI Frsky
description: The Crazybee F4 V3.1 Flight Controller comes pre-soldered with a Frsky SPI receiver and XT30 power wires. This flight controller is the default FC for the Happymodel Cine8 85mm Brushless CineWhoop, but great for other ultra-light micro drones that need space and weight savings.

name: Flywoo GOKU HEX F411 16x16 Flight Controller for Hexacopter
description: The Flywoo GOKU F411 Flight Controller (MPU6000) features 2 hardware UARTS, MPU6000, and an STM32F411 MCU. This great FC also has LEDs attached for lighting.

name: Flywoo GOKU HD745 EVO 40A AIO Stack + HM600 VTX
description: FLYWOO's new EVO series aims to make AIOs the new hot thing in FPV - and looking at the features, it is hard to resist everything on one board!

name: BETAFPV Toothpick F405 V4.0 AIO Board - F405 2-6S FC + 20A BLHeli_32 ESC
description: The new Toothpick F405 2-6S AIO 20A FC is a brushless flight controller. Compared with the V3 version, the new V4 board updates the F411 chip to F405. This item is ultralight and can be used with the toothpick drone or a cinewhoop quadcopter.

name: Flywoo GOKU GN745 AIO 40A BL32 Stack + HM600 VTX
description: The GOKU GNF745 40A FC Stack is one of the most integrated and powerful whoop/toothpick AIO boards on the market! Perfect for ultralight quads and toothpicks.

name: Happymodel CrazybeeX V2.2 5A 1-2S AIO Flight Controller
description: The Happymodel Crazybeex FR V2.2 is a 4-in-1 flight controller that comes with the Onboard 5.8GHz 40CH VTX, Onboard 5A 4-in-1 ESC, and you can choose FrSky receiver option or PNP.

name: HOM FPV F411 20A 3-4S Blheli_S AIO Flight Controller

description: The BETAFPV F4 1S AIO FC (SPI Rx) features four key components: F411 FC, 5A ESC, 25mW VTX, and an SPI receiver.

name: BETAFPV F405 12A V3 BLHeli_S 2-4S AIO Whoop Flight Controller
description: The BETAFPV F405 2-4S AIO 12A Brushless Flight Controller (BLHeli_S) V3 is a powerful FC that has been updated from an F411 chip to an F405 and can handle 12A continuous current (13A burst).

name: VAS A.C.E.™ Combat System (PWM)
description: The new ACE™ (Advanced Combat Electronics) Combat System for FPV aircraft. For how long have you asked yourself, “When can we dog fight our friends with our FPV systems and a laser?”.  The answer is now!
